title: twenty one pilots - Clancy
description: Adds album "twenty øne piløts — Clancy" to Minecraft
body:
This resoursepack adds album "twenty øne piløts — Clancy", replacing music discs:
- 13 — Overcompensate
- cat — Next Semester
- blocks — Backslide
- chirp — Midwest Indigo
- far — Routines In The Night
- mall — Vignette
- mellohi — The Craving (Jenna's version)
- stal — Lavish
- strad — Navigating
- ward — Snap Back
- 11 — Oldies Station
- wait — At The Risk Of Feeling Dumb
- pigstep — Paladin Strait

And also:
- otherside — The Craving (Single version)
